title: eurya ciliata
intro: Eurya ciliata, also known as the Chinese rowan or rowan-ebony, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Eurya ciliata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Eurya ciliata is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal purposes, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
